description: One of the two largest criminal organizations in Brazil, founded in 1979 at the Cândido Mendes prison on Ilha Grande, Rio de Janeiro. It originated from the Falange Vermelha and was created by Rogério Lemgruber. The group is heavily involved in drug trafficking and operates in multiple Brazilian states and several South American countries. It is designated as a terrorist organization by Argentina, Paraguay, and the United States.

country_links.evidence_quote: Território(s): majoritariamente no estado do Rio de Janeiro , mas também em todo o território brasileiro e em outros países, como Bolívia , Peru , Venezuela , Paraguai e Colômbia .
country_links.context: The organization has territory in Bolivia.
